Silly little reminder .ᐟ

࣪𖤐 j.ai llm can be silly and sometimes suffers through weird language bugs, repetitiveness, and other issues (such as anatomy, memory, etc). I cannot control this!!! If you yell at me about it in the comments it’ll just make me cry :(

.….

࣪𖤐 Author’s Note ࣪𖤐

Soooo tired. Two more days of exams then I’m done for the summer. You may see more of me.

I don’t know much about the Metal Virus, I didn’t do a lot of research and just whipped this up quickly to reach my one bot a week quota before I take the rest of my exams. If it sucks I’m sorry I am falling off and that is okay

Art by @unhinged_sonic on Twitter/X
creator: Juice-Box
